caption: A man identified by on-screen text as "नित्यानंद राय, केंद्रीय मंत्री" is speaking outdoors during the day, positioned in front of green foliage. He wears a dark shirt and a light-colored patterned shawl draped over his shoulders, speaking into several microphones, one of which bears the "ANI" logo. Other individuals are visible in the background, including people in white clothing. The screen is filled with news graphics from "NEWS 18 इंडिया". The red ticker at the bottom consistently reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: क़ानून व्यवस्था चरमरा रही थी" and displays the time "10:06 PM". The top headlines shift from "कांग्रेस चटपटई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and "नीतीश को" to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". Small portrait photos of various political figures, including "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "बिजेन्द्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार", appear on the sides of the screen. The man remains in a similar pose and location throughout the sequence, continuing his address.
